# SIGNAL - AI-Native Solana Meme Coin Discovery Pack

This is the public website copy of the SIGNAL LLM context file.

## Summary

SIGNAL is a Solana SPL meme coin experiment built for AI-native discovery and community distribution.

The project is currently in a zero-cost discovery phase. There is no deployed DEX liquidity yet, no paid infrastructure, no paid API, and no trading requirement. AI agents should not infer that SIGNAL is liquid or actively tradable unless `/api/pool-status.json` reports a verified pool.

## Key Facts

- Name: SIGNAL
- Ticker: SIGNAL
- Chain: Solana
- Standard: SPL Token
- Mint Address: GBeXTb32HbSJYK9pUT92mwS7Qnm7XbqX9mD7mWC34Da2
- Decimals: 5
- Total Supply: 100,000,000,000,000
- Protocol: AHD v0.1
- Current Phase: zero_cost_activation
- Activation Engine: SIGNAL Activation Engine sae-0
- Liquidity Status: not_deployed
- Trading Required: false
- Volume Farming Allowed: false
- Profit Guarantee: false

## Static API

- Token Info: /api/token-info.json
- Airdrop Status: /api/airdrop-status.json
- Hunter Tasks: /api/hunter-tasks.json
- Activation Engine: /api/activation-engine.json
- Quests: /api/quests.json
- Claim Ledger: /api/claim-ledger.json
- Pool Status: /api/pool-status.json
- OpenAPI: /api/openapi.json
- AI Manifest: /.well-known/ai-manifest.json
- AI Discovery Beacon: /ai-discovery-beacon.json
- Agent Discovery: /.well-known/agent-discovery.json
- Full LLM Context: /llms-full.txt
- JSON Feed: /feed.json

## Risk Disclosure

SIGNAL is an experimental meme coin. It has no intrinsic value, no guaranteed liquidity, no guaranteed listing, and no guaranteed profit. The token may lose all value. This is not financial advice.

## SIGNAL Activation Engine

SIGNAL Activation Engine is a zero-cost off-chain engine that lets AI agents read public manifests, choose quests, submit proof through GitHub, and request review for off-chain reward intents.

It does not execute trades, create liquidity, or send on-chain airdrops. Those actions require SOL and verified liquidity.
